description_cn: 使两个点根据变形参数的前后结果进行变化。即经过计算后，点1是点0根据变形参数变化后的结果。因此它可以保存各种类型的对称，周期性边界条件等。  Grasshopper转换对象(如反射、旋转、平移、缩放等)有一个转换(X)输出，可以作为输入使用。（变形参数主要来自变形工具组，如旋转、移动、缩放、镜像等）
description_en: This allows two points to change based on the results of the deformation parameters. That is, after calculation, point 1 is the result of point 0 after changing the deformation parameters. Therefore, it can preserve various types of symmetry, periodic boundary conditions, etc. Grasshopper transforms objects (such as reflection, rotation, translation, scaling, etc.) with a transform (X) output that can be used as input.(The deformation parameters mainly come from the deformation tools group, such as rotation, translation, scaling, mirroring, etc.)

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
